1.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

1.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
1.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

1.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
1.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

1.gl: a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare)
1.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם) (in the sense of fighting);

2.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
2.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

2.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
2.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

2.gl: a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler); figuratively, a protector; also the scaly hide of the crocodile

2.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

2.gl: defence, high fort (tower), refuge, Misgab, a place in Moab

a net, or (abstractly) capture; also a fastness

5.gl: properly, to touch, i.e. lay the hand upon (for any purpose; euphemistically, to lie with a woman); by implication, to reach (figuratively, to arrive, acquire); violently, to strike (punish, defeat, destroy, etc.)
5.kj: beat, ([idiom] be able to) bring (down), cast, come (nigh), draw near (nigh), get up, happen, join, near, plague, reach (up), smite, strike, touch.

5.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
5.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

5.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

13.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
13.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

13.gl: properly, to cast together , i.e. increase, especially in number; to multiply by the myriad
13.kj: increase, be many(-ifold), be more, multiply, ten thousands.
13.dv: a primitive root; (compare H7241 (רָבִיב)); also as denominative from H7233 (רְבָבָה);

13.gl: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
13.kj: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
13.dv: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;

13.gl: to issue, i.e. furnish; causatively, to secure; figuratively, to succeed

13.gl: properly, nourished (or fully developed), i.e. a form or sort

14.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
14.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
14.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

14.kj: captain, duke, (chief) friend, governor, guide, ox.

14.gl: to carry (literally or figuratively), or (reflexively) be burdensome; specifically, to be gravid
14.kj: bear, be a burden, carry, strong to labour.

14.dv: from H6555 (פָּרַץ)lemma פּרַץ missing vowel, corrected to פָּרַץ;

14.gl: a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area
14.kj: broad place (way), street. See also H1050 (בֵּית רְחוֹב).

15.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
15.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

15.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
15.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

15.gl: happiness; only in masculine plural construction as interjection, how happy!
